title: Create a personalized story and open Chapter 1
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can complete personalized story creation and land in Chapter 1 of the reader.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mulai
Complete the personalized story creation flow
Verify the first chapter is displayed in the reader

title: Keep private stories out of the public feed
description: This verifies that private personalized stories do not appear in the public explore feed while public stories remain available.

steps.description: Navigate to /beranda
Browse the public story feed
Verify public stories are displayed
Verify private personalized stories are not shown in the public feed

title: Branch through a story chapter and continue to the next generated chapter
description: Verifies that a reader can choose a branch in /baca/[id], see processing feedback, and reach the next chapter when generation completes.
category: Reader branching choice and chapter continuation

steps.description: Navigate to /baca/[id] for a non-final chapter
Select a branching choice
Wait for the next chapter to be ready
Open the next chapter
Verify the next chapter is displayed after the choice

title: Explore public stories from the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can leave the landing page, reach the public feed, and browse public stories successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to explore stories
Verify the public story feed is displayed

title: Resume private story creation after signing in
description: This verifies that a guest can reach the persistence boundary in the story start flow, sign in, and continue creating a private personalized story without losing progress.
category: Auth login and guest resume boundary

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai
Progress through the story start flow until the persistence boundary is reached
Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the private story creation flow is resumed after sign-in
Verify the user can continue toward creating a private story

title: Continue a personalized story through branching chapters to completion
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can read a private personalized story, make chapter choices, and reach the completion state after multiple continuations.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /mulai
Complete the personalized story creation flow
Continue through chapter choices until the story ends
Verify the completion screen is displayed

title: Start personalized story creation from the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can begin the personalized story flow from the landing page and reach the onboarding start screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to start a story
Verify the personalized story start flow is displayed

title: Continue reading through multiple chapter choices
description: Verifies that a signed-in reader can complete a multi-step branching reading journey across more than one chapter.
category: Reader branching choice and chapter continuation

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /baca/[id] for an active story
Select a branching choice
Wait for the next chapter to be ready
Select another branching choice
Verify the story advances through multiple chapters

title: Open the personal library after signing in
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can access their private library and open one of their owned stories.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /koleksiku
Open an owned private story from the library
Verify the private library is displayed
Verify an owned private story detail is opened

title: Resume personalized story creation after reaching the persistence boundary
description: This verifies that a guest can reach the login boundary from the personalized flow, sign in, and resume creation without losing progress.

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai
Advance through the onboarding flow until persistence is required
Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Return to the personalized story flow and continue creation
Verify the creation flow resumes successfully

title: Show the guest persistence boundary in story creation
description: This verifies that a guest can begin the story start flow and reaches the point where sign-in is required before private persistence continues.
category: Auth login and guest resume boundary

steps.description: Navigate to /mulai
Progress through the onboarding flow until the persistence boundary is reached
Verify a sign-in requirement is shown
Verify the user cannot continue private creation without authenticating

title: Finish a story and choose a next action
description: This verifies that a reader reaching the final chapter sees the ending state and can proceed to the library or start a new story.

steps.description: Navigate to /baca/[id]
Read until the final chapter is reached
Continue to the ending screen
Verify completion actions are displayed

title: Reach the final chapter ending with no choices
description: Verifies that the final chapter shows an ending state without branch options and offers completion actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /baca/[id] on a final chapter
Verify no choice options are shown
Verify completion actions are available

title: Browse the public feed and open a story detail
description: This verifies that a visitor can browse public stories in the feed and open a public story detail page successfully.
category: Public explore and story detail browsing

steps.description: Navigate to /beranda
Open a public story from the feed
Verify a public story detail is displayed

title: Open a private story owned by the signed-in user
description: This verifies that a signed-in user can open their own private story detail successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /cerita/[id]
Open a private story that belongs to the signed-in user
Verify the private story detail is accessible
Verify the story detail content is displayed

title: Read a public story from its detail page
description: This verifies that a user can open a readable public story detail and continue into the reader successfully.
category: Public explore and story detail browsing

steps.description: Navigate to /cerita/[id]
Continue reading the story
Verify the story reader is displayed

title: Clone a premium template into a private story and read chapter one
description: Verifies that a signed-in user can clone a public premium template into a private instance and open the cloned first chapter successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /beranda
Open a public premium story detail
Clone the template into a private instance
Verify the cloned story becomes available to read

title: Complete taste onboarding and continue
description: A user can finish the taste onboarding flow and continue into the personalized experience with their selected preferences saved.

steps.description: Navigate to /onboarding/selera
Select valid taste preferences
Continue from onboarding
Verify the onboarding completion state is shown
Verify the selected preferences are preserved

title: Continue the guest onboarding flow into the app after sign-up
description: This verifies that a new account can be created from the sign-up page and the user can continue into the app afterward.
category: Auth login and guest resume boundary

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/sign-up
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-up form
Verify the user enters the app after account creation
Verify authenticated access is available

title: Open account access from the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the authentication entry point from the landing page when they need to sign in or register.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the option to access an account
Verify an authentication screen is displayed

title: Return to the library from the ending screen
description: Verifies that a reader can leave the final chapter completion screen and return to their library.

steps.description: Navigate to /baca/[id] on a final chapter
Open the completion screen
Return to the library
Verify the library page is displayed

title: Browse public story details without exposing private content
description: This verifies that public story detail browsing shows only publicly accessible information and does not expose private story ownership data.
category: Public explore and story detail browsing

steps.description: Navigate to /beranda
Open a public story from the feed
Verify the public detail view is displayed
Verify private ownership information is not displayed

title: Start a new story from the ending screen
description: Verifies that a reader can use the completion screen to begin creating a new story after finishing one.

steps.description: Navigate to /baca/[id] on a final chapter
Open the completion screen
Start a new story
Verify the story start flow is displayed

title: Update taste preferences and save them
description: A user can adjust personalization settings in profile and save the changes successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /profil
Adjust one or more taste preference settings
Save the updated preferences
Verify the updated preferences are reflected in the profile settings view

title: Read a premium story detail before cloning
description: Verifies that a visitor can open a public premium story detail and review its content before deciding to clone it.

steps.description: Navigate to /cerita/[id] for a public premium story
Verify the story detail page displays its overview and reading entry point

title: Change taste preferences after onboarding
description: A user can revisit taste settings and update their preferences after completing onboarding.

steps.description: Navigate to /profil
Open the taste preferences section
Change an existing preference selection
Save the updated preferences
Verify the revised preferences are shown in the profile settings

title: Inspect credits on the credits page
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the credits surface and review their current credit information.

steps.description: Navigate to /kredit
Verify the credits surface is displayed
Verify current credit information is visible

title: Repeat cloning stays consistent for the same premium template
description: Verifies that repeating the clone action for the same public premium template keeps the private instance consistent.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /cerita/[id] for a public premium template
Clone the template into a private instance
Open the same premium template detail again
Repeat the clone action for the same template
Verify the private instance remains consistent after the repeated clone

title: Open profile settings and review taste preferences
description: A user can open profile settings and view their taste preferences for personalization.

steps.description: Navigate to /profil
Verify profile settings content is displayed
Verify taste preferences are visible

title: Retain taste preferences when returning to onboarding
description: A user who has already selected tastes can reopen onboarding and see their prior preference choices preserved.

steps.description: Navigate to /onboarding/selera
Select valid taste preferences
Continue from onboarding
Return to /onboarding/selera
Verify the previously selected preferences are still visible

title: Retry a story choice when another attempt is needed
description: Verifies that a reader can retry a chosen branch and still continue once the next chapter is ready.
category: Reader branching choice and chapter continuation

steps.description: Navigate to /baca/[id] for a non-final chapter
Select a branching choice
Retry the selected choice
Wait for the next chapter to be ready
Verify the reader can continue to the next chapter after retrying

title: Skip onboarding with no selection
description: A user can continue from taste onboarding without choosing preferences and still reach the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /onboarding/selera
Continue without selecting any preferences
Verify the flow completes successfully
Verify the user can proceed to the personalized experience

title: Block access to another user's private story detail
description: This verifies that a private story owned by someone else cannot be opened from the story detail route.

steps.description: Navigate to /cerita/[id]
Attempt to open another user's private story detail
Verify an access restriction is shown
Verify the private story detail is not accessible
